block.comment: To control the pace of the game (my style of doing it)
Run the code, everytime the timer clicked
If the last column on the right is further than <Game_Tunnel_DistanceApart> then add another
Data of the column A - X pos of col B - Top col C - Bot col
Move the col to the left of screen. And draw the column
Physics of the bird Drawing of the bird
*** This is where you want to change/add the user's flap ***
*** This is where you want to change/add the user's flap ***
